g.text: i will keep moving left until it find a
number which is smaller than i+1 which indecates
that the number is not increasing order
Then we will find a number just greater than number at i
then reverse the order of number from i to j which will
make the number next permutation of the given numnber
the i will stop at 2 when we replace 2 with the
next bigger number which is 4 in this case
then when we reverse the order of number from i+1 (i is at
2nd index pointing to 4) we will get 14256 which is next
